videos.title: Sultai Enchantment Mill
videos.description:
Duskmourn is a set that doesn't stop giving! We're going to take Scrabbling Skullcrab and other Mill cards in standard to the meta. Thanks to EOE, we've also got the perfect sweeper for a mill deck. 

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-sultai-enchantment-mill
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7306676#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/BEhuR
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/751Cc

videos.title: Red Deck Wins...By Not Letting You Play  Against the Odds
videos.description:
What are the odds of locking Arena Zoomers out of doing anything with Blood Moon, Strip Mine and Chalice of the Void in Timeless? Let's find out!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/against-the-odds-teaching-arena-zoomers-about-prison-timeless
